name: Gil Ardoin
subtitle: three-years sober · Wednesday-nights at Slidell VFW

ultimate_ability.label: The 90-Second Call
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Dial a sponsor from wherever you are; the CHAIN track loses three, the current visitor advances one step, and the room's temperature drops one degree. Available only once in the whole scenario · save it for when it counts.

notes: Gil's hand for the Devil arcana. Kept as tbd_devil until the hand is formally renamed in the setup files (which would require touching all 3 Devil scenarios + the Roadhouse host). Gil is a canonical parish AA character; three years sober; sponsors Lou Daigle in the_first_meeting. CHAIN is the second stat (renamed PULL / CHAIR NERVES per scenario). Scenarios: gumbo_limbo_night (canonical), the_wednesday_call (easier), the_first_meeting (hardest).
